issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. The effect places a Character on the board at the bottom of the deck, which is a return/deck placement action, not a trash action. Should use 'ReturnToHand' or a deck-placement action, but the mechanic describes putting a Character from board to bottom of deck.
Filter scope is wrong. 'TrashFromHand' filters cards in hand, but the effect targets Characters 'other than this Character' on the board. Filter should target board state, not hand.

The entire action structure is incorrect for the intended mechanic. The DSL lacks a condition structure to make the draw conditional ('You may...'). The draw should only occur if a Character is placed at bottom of deck.
